questions.question: When was Maha Shivaratri celebrated in 2025?
Which Indian AI startup launched Shuka 1.0, an open-source audio language model supporting 10 Indian languages, in August 2024?
In May 2025, India conducted joint military exercises with which country under the name 'Garuda Shakti 2025', aiming to strengthen counter-terrorism cooperation?
Who among the following was conferred with a Padma Bhushan Award 2025 in the field of (Posthumous) Affairs in April 2025?
In May 2025, which Indian state signed an MoU with IN-SPACe to establish a Space Tech Manufacturing Park and Centre of Excellence?
As per the May 2025 Supreme Court ruling, what is the minimum number of years of legal practice required for law graduates to be eligible for Civil Judge examinations?
On 22 May 2025, Israeli forces reportedly fired warning shots near a delegation of diplomats visiting which area, leading to international condemnation?
Human development is a key aspect of economic development. As per the UNDP’s Human Development Report 2025, where does India rank globally?

In April 2025, IN-SPACe launched an initiative inviting private firms to develop modular satellite platforms to host multiple payloads, aiming to reduce reliance on foreign satellite infrastructure. What is this initiative called?
How many public sector banks are operating in India, as on 1 May 2025?
In December 2024, at the King Cup International Badminton Open, whom did Lakshya Sen defeat to claim the third place?
Prime Minister Narendra Modi chaired which edition of the Governing Council meeting of NITI Aayog at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi on 24 May 2025?
Which Indian institute introduced two new BTech programs in Computational Engineering and Mechanics and Instrumentation and Biomedical Engineering, starting from the academic year 2025-26?
What declaration was made at the 2025 Global Media Dialogue on media ethics and AI?
The Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants was adopted at a Conference of Plenipotentiaries in which year?
As per the first Panchayat Advancement Index (PAI) report released in April 2025, which two states are leading with the highest number of “front runner” panchayats?
Which of the following Indian naval platforms took part in the Indo-Oman naval exercise Naseem-Al-Bahr held in October 2024?
questions.option_2: INS Vikrant and MiG-29K fighter jets
questions.option_3: INS Trikand and Dornier Maritime Patrol Aircraft
questions.option_4: INS Kolkata and Sea Guardian drone

questions.question: Which of the following states introduced India’s first AI Powered Real Time Forest alert system in May 2025?
On 23 April 2025, the Indian Government announced the suspension of which treaty/agreement with Pakistan citing national security concerns?
In which of the following cities was the Army Commanders Conference held in April 2025?
Who took charge as the Vice Chief of the Air Staff of the Indian Air Force on 2 May 2025?
questions.option_3: Air Marshal Rakesh Kumar Singh Bhadauria

questions.question: In 2025, which region in India witnessed Kuki groups demanding the maintenance of buffer zones to manage ethnic tensions?
JD Vance was sworn in as the ________ Vice President of the United States in 2025.
Which eminent violinist from Karnataka was awarded the Padma Vibhushan in 2025 for his outstanding contributions to Indian classical music?
In which Indian city was the First International Research Conference on Pension (IRCP) inaugurated in April 2025?
